inputs.label: Sum of Squares Between (SSB)
inputs.businessContext: Variation attributable to the differences between group means.

inputs.label: Sum of Squares Within (SSW)
inputs.businessContext: Variation within groups, due to random error or individual differences.

inputs.label: Degrees of Freedom Within (dfW)
inputs.businessContext: Total number of observations minus number of groups (N-k).

inputs.label: Significance Level (α)
inputs.businessContext: Threshold for statistical significance, probability of Type I error.
